name: Braised Celery (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the celery and cut into one-inch pieces. Place in a casserole dish.
2. Finely chop the bacon and onion. Sprinkle over the celery along with chopped parsley.
3. Pour stock over the ingredients.
4. Dot with knobs of butter.
5. Cover the dish and bake in a moderate oven for 30-45 minutes.
